content: Setting the SceneTo celebrate its 10th anniversary, French cosmetics brand La Rosée opened a temporary pop-up store in the Marais district of Paris:...

title: Building Block Etc. Marks a Recalibration With Objects That Earn Their Place
content: With BUILDING BLOCK ETC., sisters Kimberly and Nancy Wu recalibrate their design language through entertaining objects, curated materials, and a retail experience rooted in touch.

title: This Yellow and Black Turntable Is All About Praising Eternal Vinyl Culture
content: Jack White’s Third Man Records and Victrola team up on a special edition vinyl mixing set-up comprising a turntable and speakers.

title: Hardman Design Introduces a Dog-Sized Version of its Popular LÜNA Bed
content: Hardman Design’s new version of the original LÜNA brings the same sophisticated style to this bed for beloved pups.

title: F5: Xiao Lin Talks a Stone Seal, Her Grandmother’s Mala Bracelet, an Incense Holder + More
content: East Hampton-based architect Xiao Lin shares some of her favorite objects, from her grandmother’s mala bracelet to a ceramic incense holder, and more.

title: The American Hardwood Export Council Helps Design Take Root at Clerkenwell Design Week
content: At Clerkenwell Design Week, the American Hardwood Export Council turns material education into a creative act, using American cherry to reframe awards, authorship, and the value of natural variation.

title: The Improved Kiwibit Bird Feeder 2 takes Twitching to New Heights
content: This camera-mounted, AI-enabled, solar-powered device by Kiwibit allows hobbyists to birdwatch from anywhere.

title: Bankston and FOR SCALE Make the Case for Hardware as High Design
content: Created with FOR SCALE, A Manifesto on Touch turned basic movements—grip, pull, press, enter—into small rituals of design.

title: A Tokyo Building Offers an Elegant Answer to Urban Compression
content: Clerestory Garden turns a constrained footprint in Toshima City into a porous mixed-use building shaped by greenery, daylight, and spatial generosity.

title: These Luminaires Wear The Messiness of Their Assembly as a Badge of Honor
content: With the new SEAM collection, Australian brand Articolo champions the imperfect fusing and welding of different metals as a central ornamental detail

title: Refined Yet Rugged, One&Only Moonlight Basin Nestles Between Big Sky’s Peaks
content: The Tom Kundig-designed luxury resort recedes into it’s natural setting, providing guests with the chance to both engage with and retreat from these surroundings.

title: Ana Kraš Turns Silk Into Structural Concept with SVILA for Emma Scully Gallery
content: How silk shifts with light, a UNESCO-protected woodcarving technique, and the conceptual weight of a cocoon - Ana Kraš's Svila is a collection built around material that refuses to stay still.

title: This Lighting Collection Might Be The Best New York Design Industry Collab Yet
content: Local independent studios Kawabi and Christopher Merchant join forces on the Amica Collection, produced by design resource showroom and gallery Assembly Line.
